<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\Solutions; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\Solutions\Laravel\SuggestLivewirePropertyNameSolution as BaseSuggestLivewirePropertyNameSolutionAlias; use Spatie\Ignition\Contracts\Solution; class SuggestLivewirePropertyNameSolution extends BaseSuggestLivewirePropertyNameSolutionAlias implements Solution { }
